sources.description: Active rating factors from SQL Server containing base rates and multipliers by product and territory.
Policy endorsement transactions that modify or add premium amounts to existing policies.
Master policy records containing policy identifiers, product and territory codes, premiums, terms, dates, and status.
Reference data containing rate adjustment factors by territory for premium calculations.

targets.description: Aggregated premium calculations by product and territory with earned premium, written premium, policy counts, and territory rankings for actuarial and reporting purposes.

joins.description: Attaches total endorsement premiums to active policies to calculate adjusted premium amounts.
Applies rating engine multipliers and base rates to policies based on product and territory classification.
Enriches rated policies with additional territory-specific rate adjustment factors from reference data.

sql_blocks: (SELECT product_cd, territory_cd, base_rate, rate_multiplier FROM dbo.RateFactors WHERE active_flag = 1) rate_factors

transformations.description: Filters policies to include only those with ACTIVE status for premium calculations.
Sums endorsement premiums by policy to determine total endorsement impact per policy.
Calculates adjusted premium by adding endorsement premium to written premium and applying rate multiplier.
Computes earned premium by prorating adjusted premium based on policy term months over twelve-month period.
Adds calculation timestamp to track when premium computation was performed.
Aggregates earned premium, written premium, and policy counts by product and territory for summary reporting.
Ranks territories within each product by total earned premium to identify top-performing territories.

business_summary: This PySpark job calculates earned and adjusted premiums for active insurance policies by combining policy master data with endorsements and applying rating factors from both Hive reference tables and a SQL Server rating engine database. It aggregates premiums and policy counts by product and territory, ranks territories by earned premium performance within each product line, and persists the results to a Delta table for downstream actuarial analysis, financial reporting, and product performance monitoring.

needs_review.description: Active rating factors from SQL Server containing base rates and multipliers by product and territory.
Policy endorsement transactions that modify or add premium amounts to existing policies.
Master policy records containing policy identifiers, product and territory codes, premiums, terms, dates, and status.
Aggregated premium calculations by product and territory with earned premium, written premium, policy counts, and territory rankings for actuarial and reporting purposes.
